prompt: Hero frame, aspect 9:16, Minimalist 3D with bright, contrasting colors and simple geometric shapes. A bright #FF007F humanoid ragdoll mid-flip diving headfirst into a small circular #AEE2FF swimming pool, but the pool's side wall is sliced open like an architectural cross-section, revealing a vertical shaft plunging deep below with stacked depth markers (-50m, -200m) and a glowing #C754D9 purple abyss at the bottom. Bold pink banner overlay reads 'HOW DEEP CAN YOU GO?' in the game's chunky sans-serif. Soft pastel lighting, flat shading, in-game HUD with depth counter top-right, height markers along the platform edge. Authentic Flip & Dive 3D in-game moment, no realism, no shadows. [Audio: VO (curious whisper) 'Wait… how deep does it actually go?' / calm satisfying lo-fi at 80 BPM with soft synth pads / whoosh on flip at 0.5s, muted splash at 2s, ascending chime as depth counter ticks past 200m]
